Class RestaurantController

java.lang.Object
RestaurantGame.RestaurantController
public class RestaurantController extends Object
CSC 335, Fall 2025 file RestaurantController.java: This class is responsible to controls the game and acess the functions through the RestaurantModel.java file.

  • Constructor Details

    • RestaurantController

      public RestaurantController()
      creates a new controller of the game
      Parameters:
      model - a model created from the file RestaurantModel that runs the function which the controller display

    • isDayOver

      public boolean isDayOver()
      checks if the day is over
